title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE DONE
end: YOGA EXERCISES WHEN YOU CALL (TO DO)

title: Repita a frase
answer: SHE WILL HAVE DONE YOGA EXERCISES WHEN YOU CALL
translate: ELA TERÁ FEITO EXERCÍCIOS DE YOGA QUANDO VOCÊ LIGAR

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE MADE

title: Repita a frase
answer: HE’S GOING TO HAVE MADE LUNCH BY NOON
translate: ELE TERÁ FEITO O ALMOÇO ATÉ MEIO-DIA

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE BEGUN
start: AT THIS TIME TOMORROW HE WILL

title: Repita a frase
answer: AT THIS TIME TOMORROW HE WILL HAVE BEGUN WORKING
translate: NESSA HORA AMANHÃ ELE TERÁ COMEÇADO A TRABALHAR

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE WORKED
start: BY THE END OF THE MONTH I WILL

title: Repita a frase
answer: BY THE END OF THE MONTH I WILL HAVE WORKED ON THE PROJECT
translate: ATÉ O FINAL DO MÊS EU TEREI TRABALHADO NO PROJETO

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE CLEANED
start: BY THE TIME YOU COME I WILL

title: Repita a frase
answer: BY THE TIME YOU COME I WILL HAVE CLEANED THE WHOLE HOUSE
translate: NO MOMENTO EM QUE VOCÊ VIER EU TEREI LIMPADO A CASA TODA

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE GRADUATED

title: Repita a frase
answer: THEY ARE GOING TO HAVE GRADUATED BY NEXT YEAR
translate: ELES TERÃO SE GRADUADO ATÉ PRÓXIMO ANO

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE DECIDED
start: WHEN THE WAITER ASKS, WE WILL

title: Repita a frase
answer: WHEN THE WAITER ASKS, WE WILL HAVE DECIDED WHAT TO ORDER
a: WHEN THE WAITER ASKS WE WILL HAVE DECIDED WHAT TO ORDER
translate: QUANDO O GARÇOM PERGUNTAR, NÓS TEREMOS DECIDIDO O QUE PEDIR

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE SLEPT
end: FOR 10 HOURS WHEN HER PARENTS GET HOME (TO SLEEP)

title: Repita a frase
answer: SHE WILL HAVE SLEPT FOR 10 HOURS WHEN HER PARENTS GET HOME
translate: ELA TERÁ DORMIDO POR 10 HORAS QUANDO SEUS PAIS CHEGAREM EM CASA

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE SOLD
end: HIS MOTORBIKE BEFORE THE HOLIDAY (TO SELL)

title: Repita a frase
answer: MORGAN IS GOING TO HAVE SOLD HIS MOTORBIKE BEFORE THE HOLIDAY
translate: MORGAN TERÁ VENDIDO SUA MOTO ANTES DO FERIADO

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE STARTED

title: Repita a frase
answer: AMY WILL HAVE STARTED COOKING BY 8 A.M.
a: AMY WILL HAVE STARTED COOKING BY 8 AM
translate: AMY TERÁ COMEÇADO A COZINHAR POR VOLTA DAS 8 DA MANHÃ

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE READ
end: 5 BOOKS BY THE END OF THE SEMESTER (TO READ)

title: Repita a frase
answer: AMANDA WILL HAVE READ 5 BOOKS BY THE END OF THE SEMESTER
a: AMANDA WILL HAVE READ FIVE BOOKS BY THE END OF THE SEMESTER
translate: AMANDA TERÁ LIDO 5 LIVROS ATÉ O FIM DO SEMESTRE

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE LEFT

title: Repita a frase
answer: I WILL HAVE LEFT BY 6 P.M.
a: I WILL HAVE LEFT BY SIX P.M.
b: I WILL HAVE LEFT BY 6 PM
c: I WILL HAVE LEFT BY SIX PM
translate: EU TEREI SAÍDO POR VOLTA DAS 6 DA TARDE

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE DONE

title: Repita a frase
answer: SHE'S GOING TO HAVE DONE THE LAUNDRY BY 2 P.M.
a: SHE'S GOING TO HAVE DONE THE LAUNDRY BY TWO P.M.
b: SHE'S GOING TO HAVE DONE THE LAUNDRY BY 2 PM
c: SHE'S GOING TO HAVE DONE THE LAUNDRY BY TWO PM
translate: ELA TERÁ LAVADO A ROUPA POR VOLTA DAS 2 DA TARDE

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE FULFILLED

title: Repita a frase
answer: BY NOVEMBER THEY WILL HAVE FULFILLED THEIR OBLIGATIONS
translate: ATÉ NOVEMBRO ELES TERÃO CUMPRIDO COM SUAS OBRIGAÇÕES

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE STUDIED

title: Repita a frase
answer: BEFORE SATURDAY YOU WILL HAVE STUDIED ALL THE LESSONS
translate: ANTES DE SÁBADO VOCÊ TERÁ ESTUDADO TODAS AS LIÇÕES

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE SHOWED

title: Repita a frase
answer: THEY’RE GOING TO HAVE SHOWED UP BY DINNER TIME
translate: ELES TERÃO CHEGADO ATÉ A HORA DO JANTAR

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE FINISHED
end: WATCHING ALL THE SEASONS BY JULY (TO FINISH)

title: Repita a frase
answer: YOU WILL HAVE FINISHED WATCHING ALL THE SEASONS BY JULY
translate: VOCÊ TERÁ TERMINADO DE ASSISTIR A TODAS AS TEMPORADAS ATÉ JULHO

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE FIXED

title: Repita a frase
answer: THE MECHANIC IS GOING TO HAVE FIXED THE CAR BY FRIDAY
translate: O MECÂNICO TERÁ CONSERTADO O CARRO ATÉ SEXTA

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE MADE
start: BY THE TIME YOU MEET HER SHE WILL

answer: BY THE TIME YOU MEET HER SHE WILL HAVE MADE UP HER MIND
translate: NO MOMENTO EM QUE VOCÊ FALAR COM ELA, ELA TERÁ TOMADO UMA DECISÃO

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE VISITED
end: THE SHOE STORES BY THE TIME I GET TO THE MALL (TO VISIT)

title: Repita a frase
answer: YOU WILL HAVE VISITED THE SHOE STORES BY THE TIME I GET TO THE MALL
translate: VOCÊ TERÁ VISITADO AS LOJAS DE SAPATO NO MOMENTO EM QUE EU CHEGAR NO SHOPPING

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE FORGOTTEN

title: Repita a frase
answer: HE WILL HAVE FORGOTTEN IT BY NEXT WEEK
translate: ELE TERÁ ESQUECIDO ISSO ATÉ A PRÓXIMA SEMANA

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE MAILED

title: Repita a frase
answer: MARIAH WILL HAVE MAILED THE CONTRACT BY 1 P.M
a: MARIA WILL HAVE MAILED THE CONTRACT BY 1 P.M.
b: MARIA WILL HAVE MAILED THE CONTRACT BY 1 PM

translate: MARIAH TERÁ ENVIADO O CONTRATO POR VOLTA DE UMA DA TARDE

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE SUNG
end: HAPPY BIRTHDAY BY THE TIME YOU ARRIVE (TO SING)

title: Repita a frase
answer: WE WILL HAVE SUNG HAPPY BIRTHDAY BY THE TIME YOU ARRIVE
translate: NÓS TEREMOS CANTADO FELIZ ANIVERSÁRIO NO MOMENTO EM QUE VOCÊ CHEGAR

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE TRAVELED
end: TO 5 COUNTRIES BY NEXT YEAR (TO TRAVEL)

translate: ELES TERÃO VIAJADO PARA 5 PAÍSES ATÉ O PRÓXIMO ANO

title: COMPLETE COM OS VERBOS INDICADOS
answer: HAVE SET
end: BY THE TIME YOU GET THERE (TO SET)

title: Repita a frase
answer: THE SUN WILL HAVE SET BY THE TIME YOU GET THERE
translate: O SOL TERÁ SE POSTO NO MOMENTO EM QUE VOCÊ CHEGAR LÁ
